allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: update tabbed showcase with auto-transition and new first step

- Change first step from "Ask your question" to "Data Configuration" in both EN and AR
- Add automatic tab transition cycling through all 4 steps every 5 seconds
- Users can still manually click tabs while auto-transition continues

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add comprehensive policy pages \(Privacy, Terms, Data Security\)

- Created Privacy Policy page \(EN & AR\) with Zero Data Movement architecture details
- Created Terms & Conditions page \(EN & AR\) with licensing, payment, and compliance info  
- Created Data Security page \(EN & AR\) with 12 comprehensive security sections
- Updated footer bottom links: Privacy Policy, Terms & Conditions, Data Security
- Updated Footer component to link to new policy pages \(/privacy, /terms, /security\)
- Fixed TabbedShowcase React hook ESLint warning
- All pages follow website UI/UX with matching design patterns

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
